    base:desc "Manufacturing system comprising physical objects and processes within a manufacturing environment. Key characteristics include real-time data generation, multi-level abstraction (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer), and integration of heterogeneous stakeholders, making it suitable for digital twinning through Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) methodologies.",

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system adheres to industry standards including SysML for systems engineering modeling, ACME, AADL, and MontiArc as architecture description languages (ADLs), and methodologies such as RFLP (Requirements, Functions, Logics, Physics), OOSEM, SPES, and SMArDT for managing system complexity across abstraction levels (requirements, functional architecture, logical architecture, product/technical layer)."
